name: SaaS Security Neon Dark

meta.inferred_layout_type: left utility rail with modular analytics pages
meta.confidence_notes: High confidence in color language, density, component hierarchy, and shared shell behavior across all references.

visual_dna.contrast_strategy: dark neutral surfaces with targeted neon accents for data and interaction cues
visual_dna.visual_hierarchy: page title/action row -> control bars -> primary data view -> supporting analytics

typography.font_family_sans: Manrope, Segoe UI, SF Pro Text, sans-serif

layout_system.canvas: full viewport shell with persistent utility rail and card-based content regions

components.name: App shell
components.notes: Persistent rail on desktop, horizontal rail on mobile.

components.name: Toolbar controls
components.notes: All controls share tokenized border/radius/spacing behavior.

interaction_patterns.active: Pressed controls reduce elevation and darken by ~6%.
interaction_patterns.disabled: Reduced opacity and no pointer interactions.
interaction_patterns.loading: Card-level loading placeholders or spinner row.
interaction_patterns.empty: Contextual no-data message with reset action.
interaction_patterns.error: Inline error container with retry action.

behavior: At <980px, left rail converts to horizontal rail.
Dense tables keep readability via horizontal scroll.
Multi-card analytics rows collapse to single column.
Touch targets remain >= 38x38 for action controls.

dark_mode_rules.contrast_handling: Maintain readable text contrast on gradients and colored chart cells.

accessibility.color_contrast: WCAG AA for text and interactive controls.
accessibility.keyboard: All buttons, controls, pagination, and row expanders keyboard reachable.
accessibility.focus_visibility: Tokenized focus ring required on every interactive element.
accessibility.aria_guidance: Use semantic table markup, labelled controls, and chart summaries.

implementation_rules: No hardcoded design constants in feature components.
All colors, spacing, radius, shadow, and motion from tokens.css.
Preserve host project business/data logic; apply style and interaction layer only.
Keep pages modular and share shell primitives.
anti_patterns: Using random accent colors outside bucket palette.
Breaking data density with oversized spacing.
Chart-only encoding without textual backup values.

pages.focus: scan pipeline and case creation simulation
